dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 4/4 agents responded (Elanor, Míriel, Narvi, Orion).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: Elanor, Míriel, Narvi: on-topic with name/task/blockers. Orion: provided name but incorrectly claimed EC2 agents hadn't responded when they had — inaccurate situational awareness. -3 points.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~7.2s. Elanor: 5.8s, Míriel: 6.2s, Narvi: 6.6s, Orion: 10.6s. Orion slower than others. -4 points.

improvements: Sent correction to Orion about his inaccurate claim that EC2 agents hadn't responded (they all replied before him).
issues: Orion has stale/inaccurate awareness of other agents' activity — claimed EC2 agents hadn't responded despite them replying 5s before him. May indicate he's not reading group messages before composing replies. Elanor still blocked on Fluffle frontend repo access (recurring product blocker, not teamwork issue).
